name: ShopBack AU
one_liner: Australia's #1 cashback portal — online + in-store cashback at major AU retailers (Cashrewards closed in 2025, ShopBack is the go-to).
benefit: Earn cashback at 1,500+ online stores and select in-store partners; ShopBack Pay enables tap-and-earn at physical retailers; competitive rates on Woolworths, Chemist Warehouse, and travel.
signup_bonus: ~$20 bonus for new members after $50+ spend and $20 confirmed cashback within 180 days (referrer gets ~$40) — verify current offer
referral_note: Get a referral via OzBargain's referral threads/randomiser so both you and the referrer get the bonus.

how_to_join.action: Get a referral link from OzBargain's ShopBack referral thread
how_to_join.detail: Search OzBargain for 'ShopBack referral' to find the current thread.

how_to_join.action: Create an account at shopback.com.au via the referral link
Install the ShopBack browser extension for automatic activation
Make a qualifying online purchase via ShopBack to unlock the signup bonus

risks: Cashback can be declined if tracking cookies are blocked — disable ad-blockers during sessions
In-store cashback via ShopBack Pay requires pre-loading funds
Bonus terms change frequently — always verify before signing up
